name: For each topic below need to give points out of 10 in each candidate sheet

scores.week1: Engages in pair programming, helps others
Open to feedback, improves based on suggestions
Meets deadlines, punctual, shows ownership
Proactively explores new tools/topics
Completes tasks without frequent follow-ups
Can speak clearly about their work, asks clarifying questions
Explains technical concepts simply
Proper structure, subject line, grammar, tone
Slack/Teams messages are clear and concise
Comfort with JavaScript, React, Node, etc.
Understanding of React/MERN concepts, best practices
Ability to break down issues and debug efficiently
Clean code, modularity, naming conventions
Use of branches, commits, PRs, rebasing, etc.
Understanding of testing frameworks, writing tests
Consuming REST APIs, handling errors, async logic
Ability to deliver features with minimal supervision
Adherence to internal delivery methodology/process (e.g. sprint, reviews)
Timely updates, breaking tasks, tracking with tools (e.g., Jira, Trello)
PR descriptions, code comments, meeting notes
Naming conventions, folder structure, formatting
Self-validation, not pushing broken code
